name: Coiling Evil Tide
statusOutcome: Knee-high in the dark slimy goo, you find the living amorphous liquid hungrily tugging at your limbs and body, pulling you toward the center of the gooey amalgamation while enveloping you up to your waist, leaving you surrounded by the three gooey women who giggle in delight at your growing predicament.
statusMiss: Knee-high in the dark slimy goo, you find the living amorphous liquid hungrily tugging at your limbs and body, but you manage to shake off the syrupy entanglement!
